# --- SCRIPT START ---
while True:
  sync_move_to(200, 0, 50, 0)
  while (ir_detected("GP4")) == False:
    script_conveyor(1, 1, 0)
  sleep(0.5)
  script_conveyor(0, 1, 0)
  sync_move_named("overbelt", 0, 0, 0, 0)
  sync_move_named("belt", 0, 0, 0, 0)
  core.set_vacuum(True)
  sync_move_named("overbelt", 0, 0, 0, 0)
  sync_move_named("2 overbelt", 0, 0, 0, 0)
  sync_move_named("2 belt", 0, 0, 0, 0)
  core.set_vacuum(False)
  script_conveyor(1, 1, 0)
